message:
chore: sync latest multi-agent changes

Widgets persistence expansion:
- list.rs: implement Stateful trait for ListState
- table.rs: additional persistence methods

Runtime enhancements:
- program.rs: additional tracing instrumentation
- subscription.rs: active_count() helper method
- terminal_writer.rs: minor adjustments

Demo:
- chrome.rs: style refinement
- text_effects.rs: cleanup

Beads:
- Sync issues.jsonl tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
